mapper.insert: INSERT INTO projects ( title, summary, description, thumbnail_url, start_date, end_date, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{title}, #{summary}, #{description}, #{thumbnailUrl}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, title, summary, description, thumbnail_url, start_date, end_date, created_at, updated_at FROM projects WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, title, summary, description, thumbnail_url, start_date, end_date, created_at, updated_at FROM projects ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE projects SET title = #{title}, summary = #{summary}, description = #{description}, thumbnail_url = #{thumbnailUrl}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
